productDisplayName: Converse Men CT AS 17 NYC Grey Shoes
description: The converse All Star has been a hot favourite casual footwear since 1908. In the 1920s Chuck Taylor, a Basketball player and shoe salesman for Converse, improved the shoe's design and became the product's spokesperson - giving his name to the favourite style - Chuck Taylor All Stars. Try these ü ber stylish, no frills high top canvas shoes to up your style this summer.UpperCanvas upper for easy maintenance and durabilityUpper with All Star patch detailing beside the ankle and graffiti on the other side of the ankleMonochrome upper with sunny yellow contrast lacing for maximum styleCarbon rubber toe box for enhanced protection of the upper footLong canvas tongue for added comfort and snug  FitLace-ups through metal eyelets for snug fit and durabilityEyelets on the lateral side for ventilationMidsoleMidsole made of contoured latex foam for high energy return and cushioningOutsoleVulcanized rubber outsole for flexibility and tractionDiamond-shaped lugs on the forefoot and heel, with horizontal lugs and grooves on the toe and heel region and slanting grooves along the periphery and midfoot for superior grip on all terrainsShoe careMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot waterRub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brushWash off with lukewarm water
